title: T-048 — quality_incidents schema + RLS (09-e-01)
prompt:
# T-048 — quality_incidents schema + RLS

PRD: §6.3 quality_incidents DDL, §9.1 RLS, §11.6 V-QA-INCIDENT-001
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create quality_incidents standalone table (accident/near-miss/unsafe_condition/food_safety_incident) with sequence, retention 10y, RLS function-form, Drizzle schema.

## Implementation contract
Migration 0141 emits CREATE SEQUENCE quality_incident_seq + CREATE TABLE quality_incidents per §6.3 verbatim (incident_number GENERATED, incident_type CHECK 4 values, severity CHECK, linked_ncr_id FK, retention_until 10y GENERATED). RLS function-form. Drizzle schema export.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0141_quality_incidents.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/qualityIncidents.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/quality-incidents-schema.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0141 applied, when \d quality_incidents runs, then all §6.3 columns exist with incident_type CHECK in {accident,near_miss,unsafe_condition,food_safety_incident} and retention_until=incident_date+10y GENERATED, RLS function-form enabled
2. Given two tenants with app.current_org_id() set, when each inserts and SELECTs, then each sees only its own row
3. Given an insert with incident_type='accident', when V-QA-INCIDENT-001 enforcement runs (a notification job or Server Action layer T-054), then a corrective_action_due_at=incident_date+24h derived field is queryable (in this task: schema field exists or is computed via view; full enforcement in T-054)

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: quality-incidents-schema.test.ts before migration
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test quality-incidents-schema'

## Risk red lines
- Use app.current_org_id() function (Wave0)
- 10y retention GENERATED
- No deviation from §6.3 column names

pipeline_inputs.description: quality_incidents standalone table (accident/near-miss/unsafe/food-safety) + RLS function-form + 10y retention.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration 0141 + Drizzle schema per §6.3 verbatim. incident_number GENERATED via SEQUENCE quality_incident_seq. incident_type CHECK in 4 values. retention_until 10y GENERATED. RLS function-form. PRD anchors verified: §6.3 source DDL; §9.1 RLS pattern; §11.6 V-QA-INCIDENT-001 (corrective_action within 24h enforcement deferred to T-054 Server Action layer).
out_of_scope: Do not implement incident Server Actions (T-054)
Do not implement V-QA-INCIDENT-001 corrective-action enforcement here (T-054)
acceptance_criteria: Given migration 0141 applied, when \d quality_incidents runs, then all §6.3 columns exist (incident_type CHECK 4 values, severity CHECK, retention_until 10y GENERATED) and RLS function-form is enabled
Given two tenants with app.current_org_id() each, when each inserts and SELECTs, then each sees only its own row
Given an insert with incident_type='accident', when SELECT runs, then incident_number is GENERATED in format 'INC-NNNNNNNN' and retention_until = incident_date + 10y
test_strategy: Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test quality-incidents-schema'
